response:
```sql
WITH monthly_signups AS (
    SELECT
        DATE_TRUNC('month', created_at) AS signup_month,
        COUNT(id) AS current_month_signups
    FROM
        users
    GROUP BY
        DATE_TRUNC('month', created_at)
),
lagged_signups AS (
    SELECT
        signup_month,
        current_month_signups,
        LAG(current_month_signups, 1) OVER (ORDER BY signup_month) AS previous_month_signups
    FROM
        monthly_signups
)
SELECT
    signup_month,
    current_month_signups,
    previous_month_signups,
    CASE
        WHEN previous_month_signups IS NULL OR previous_month_signups = 0 THEN NULL
        ELSE (CAST(current_month_signups AS NUMERIC) - previous_month_signups) / previous_month_signups
    END AS month_over_month_growth_rate
FROM
    lagged_signups
ORDER BY
    signup_month;
```
